sqlMap.select: SELECT rol.* from dst_rol rol, dst_rol_servicio rs where rs.id_servicio = #id_servicio# and nvl(rol.id_usuario, -1) = nvl(#id_usuario#, -1) AND rs.id_rol = rol.id_rol
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM dst_rol_servicio WHERE id_rol = #id_rol# and id_servicio = #id_servicio#
sqlMap.select: select * from dst_servicio ser, dst_rol_servicio rs, dst_administrativo_rol ar where ser.id_servicio = rs.id_servicio and rs.id_rol = ar.id_rol and ar.id_administrativo = #id_administrativo#
SELECT id_servicio from dst_url_servicio WHERE url = #url#
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dst_administrativo_rol ar, dst_rol_servicio rs WHERE ar.id_administrativo = #id_administrativo# AND rs.id_servicio = #id_servicio# AND ar.id_rol = rs.id_rol

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dst_administrativo_rol ar, dst_rol_servicio rs, dst_url_servicio us WHERE ar.id_administrativo = #id_administrativo# AND us.url = #url# AND rs.id_servicio = us.id_servicio AND ar.id_rol = rs.id_rol
